summary: Full backend and frontend testing completed for PumpRadar crypto signal dashboard. All core flows working after fixing 1 critical backend bug.

critical.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes at server.py line 627. Fixed by normalizing sub_expiry timezone.

ui_bugs.issue: Browser tab/sidebar still shows 'Katalyst' instead of 'PumpRadar'. Also a premium upsell popup 'Evolve Your Workflow / Try Magic Now' appears on dashboard - this is Katalyst template boilerplate and should be removed.

issues: Demo credentials box shows 'admin@example.com / password' which are invalid credentials for PumpRadar. Should be updated or removed.
Prices display in EUR (€ 29.99) but the spec says $29.99. Minor display issue.

action_items: Update login page demo credentials to valid PumpRadar credentials or remove them
Remove Katalyst boilerplate premium upsell popup from dashboard
Update sidebar/browser tab brand from 'Katalyst' to 'PumpRadar'
Fix currency symbol on subscription page from € to $ if intended to be USD
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 627: timezone-naive vs timezone-aware datetime comparison bug (FIXED in this iteration)
server.py is 854 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, crypto, subscriptions)
Login form has hardcoded demo credentials (admin@example.com/password) that are not valid for PumpRadar backend

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all core flows work, minor branding/UI issues)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend bug fixed: timezone comparison in get_signals when user has trial subscription. All 7 backend tests pass. Frontend login->dashboard->signals->subscription flow all working. Signals have real data (6 PUMP, 5 DUMP, 100 coins analyzed). Minor issues: Katalyst branding, demo credentials on login form, EUR vs USD currency.

rca_of_issues.cause: subscription_expiry stored in MongoDB as naive datetime (without timezone), but compared with datetime.now(timezone.utc) which is tz-aware. Python raises TypeError on such comparisons.
rca_of_issues.fix: Added timezone normalization: if sub_expiry.tzinfo is None, replace with UTC
rca_of_issues.reproduction: Register user, log in with that user's token, call GET /api/crypto/signals -> 500 error
